data_quality_note: accounts.churn_flag was found to be statistically independent of the actual subscription/churn_event history and is NOT used anywhere in this analysis. 'Currently churned' is derived only from whether a later subscription exists after an account's most recent logged churn event.

unknown.offer: Discovery call to diagnose reason before offering anything
